headline: Are You Looking for a High-Growth Dividend Stock?
summary: Dividends are one of the best benefits to being a shareholder, but finding a great dividend stock is no easy task. Does State Street (STT) have what it takes? Let's find out.

headline: A Look At State Street (STT) Valuation After Strong Revenue And Earnings Figures
summary: Why State Street is on investors’ radar right now State Street (STT) has recently drawn attention after delivering annual revenue of US$13.9b and net income of US$2.7b, raising questions about how its current share performance aligns with those fundamentals. See our latest analysis for State Street. Despite a recent soft patch, with a 7 day share price return of 6.5% and a 30 day share price return of 8.55% at US$121.04, longer term momentum is still reflected in a 1 year total shareholder...
